soporte_faq_q1: How do I place an order?
soporte_faq_a1: Choose your products in the store, add them to your cart, and complete the checkout. You'll receive a confirmation email.
soporte_faq_a2: Domestic shipments take 3 to 7 business days. International shipments may take 7 to 15 business days depending on the destination.
soporte_faq_a3: Yes, you'll receive a tracking number by email once your order ships. You can track it directly on the carrier's website.
soporte_faq_q4: How do you verify age for mezcal purchases?
soporte_faq_a4: We perform an age verification when you enter the site. You must be 18 years or older to purchase alcoholic beverages on our platform.
soporte_faq_q5: What payment methods do you accept?
soporte_faq_a5: We accept credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via Stripe, as well as PayPal.
soporte_faq_a6: We accept returns within 7 days of receipt if the product arrives damaged or incorrect. Contact us via the support form.
